new_page.title: Welcome to Multica
new_page.description: One workspace where you and your AI teammates work side by side — taking issues, leaving comments, sharing the same context.

creation_disabled.description: This Multica instance does not allow new workspaces to be created. Ask your administrator for an invitation to an existing workspace.
